name: 20 GM Hydroquinone Tretinoin And Mometasone Furoate Cream
about: The 20 GM Hydroquinone Tretinoin And Mometasone Furoate Cream is a dermatologically tested cream suitable for all skin types. The cream is in the form of a white cream that is easy to use and store in a dry place. The cream is a combination of Hydroquinone, Tretinoin, and Mometasone Furoate, which are effective in treating skin issues like acne, hyperpigmentation, and eczema. Hydroquinone reduces the production of melanin and helps in reducing dark spots, while Tretinoin helps in the renewal of skin cells and reduces acne. Mometasone Furoate reduces inflammation and itching caused by eczema and other skin allergies. The cream is perfect for those who want a one-stop solution for their various skin issues.

faq.q: What is the main purpose of the 20 GM Hydroquinone Tretinoin And Mometasone Furoate Cream?
faq.a: The cream is used for treating various skin issues like hyperpigmentation, acne, and eczema.

faq.q: Can people with sensitive skin use this cream?
faq.a: Yes, the cream is suitable for all skin types.

faq.q: How should I store this cream?
faq.a: The cream should be stored in a dry place.
No, the cream is not disposable.

faq.q: Is the cream easy to use?
faq.a: Yes, the cream is easy to use.
